sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, original_text VARCHAR(255), ascii_text VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_text, ascii_text) VALUES (1, 'Café', asciify('Café'));
UPDATE test_strings SET ascii_text = asciify(original_text) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT original_text, ascii_text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_text, ascii_text) VALUES (2, 'Jürgen', asciify('Jürgen'));
